questions: Does hlx tickets get display approval status when present?
Does hlx tickets list show an approval indicator when present?

answers.answer: Yes. The printTicketDetail function conditionally displays an 'Approval:' line when ticket.approvalStatus is truthy, following the exact same pattern as mergeQueueStatus.
evidence: get.ts line 20: approvalStatus: string | null in TicketDetail type
get.ts lines 61-63: conditional display of Approval: line

answers.answer: Yes. The list output appends a [STATUS] tag (e.g., [PENDING], [APPROVED]) when approvalStatus is non-null. When null, no indicator is shown.
evidence: list.ts line 10: approvalStatus: string | null in TicketItem type
list.ts lines 106-107: approvalTag suffix in console.log

answers.answer: Yes. npx tsc --noEmit exits with code 0 and no errors.
evidence: npx tsc --noEmit: exit code 0, no output

statement: CLI implementation complete. Added approvalStatus to TicketDetail and TicketItem types, conditional display in get and list commands. TypeScript typecheck passes with zero errors.
